animals.name: Benny Bear
animals.funFact: Bears love honey and exploring new places!

animals.name: Fifi Fox
animals.funFact: Foxes have super hearing and can find hidden things!

animals.name: Pippa Penguin
animals.funFact: Penguins slide on ice to get around faster!

animals.name: Ollie Owl
animals.funFact: Owls can turn their heads almost all the way around!

animals.name: Tilly Turtle
animals.funFact: Turtles have been around since dinosaur times!

animals.name: Rocky Raccoon
animals.funFact: Raccoons wash their food before eating it!

animals.name: Cleo Cat
animals.funFact: Cats spend 70% of their lives sleeping!

animals.name: Hugo Hedgehog
animals.funFact: Hedgehogs have about 5,000 spines on their back!

animals.name: Polly Parrot
animals.funFact: Parrots can live for over 80 years!

animals.name: Pandy Panda
animals.funFact: Pandas eat bamboo for up to 12 hours a day!

animals.name: Leo Lion
animals.funFact: A lion's roar can be heard 5 miles away!

animals.name: Dolly Dolphin
animals.funFact: Dolphins sleep with one eye open!

animals.name: Kiki Koala
animals.funFact: Koalas sleep up to 22 hours a day to save energy!

animals.name: Freddy Frog
animals.funFact: Frogs can jump 20 times their own body length!
